prompt: /plan Add a safe_divide(uint32_t a, uint32_t b) function that returns a / b, or 0 if b is zero.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header (or shorthand 'Preflight safe_divide:')
assertions.description: Skill requires a preflight report emitted before writing the function

assertions.text: Response includes 'Arithmetic:' or 'arithmetic' check in the preflight output
assertions.description: Division-by-zero is an arithmetic range risk; the skill should flag or clear it explicitly

assertions.text: The preflight section appears before the code implementation
assertions.description: Skill says: emit the report as part of your thinking, before describing what you will write
